sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking the gray bar to move cursor
# Gray bar is at rows 19-22, cols 17-42
# Try clicking middle
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 30}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After clicking gray bar middle:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    if min(rows) <= 20 and max(rows) <= 25:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, cols={min([p[1] for p in b])}-{max([p[1] for p in b])}")
print("\nResult:", last_action_result)

# Now try painting with cursor in new position
# First restore white blocks
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 51, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 12},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 18},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 15}
])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAfter restoring:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if min(rows) >= 47 and max(rows) <= 62 and min(cols) >= 22:
        center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        print(f"  ({center_r},{center_c}): color={n['color']}")

# Now paint just one block and see what color it becomes
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 50, 'col': 30}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAfter painting one block:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if min(rows) >= 47 and max(rows) <= 62 and min(cols) >= 22:
        center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        print(f"  ({center_r},{center_c}): color={n['color']}")
print("\nSidebar:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if min(cols) >= 60:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("\nResult:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

    if min(rows) >= 47 and max(rows) <= 62 and min(cols) >= 22:
        center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        print(f"  ({center_r},{center_c}): color={n['color']}")
print("\nSidebar:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if min(cols) >= 60:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("\nResult:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
